description.value: Price 3,500 gp; Slot body; CL 1st Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint transmutation APPEARANCE These fine dresses are delicately woven with magically preserved and layered leaves. EFFECTS A Medium humanoid who takes 1 interrupted minute to don a gown of graceful petiteness is, at the end of that time, immediately reduced to Small size. This acts as reduce person, except that it does not grant a size bonus to Dexterity or resize items on the wearerâs person other than the gown itself. Taking off the gown also requires 1 interrupted minute and returns the gown and its wearer to their original sizes. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,750 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells reduce person; Special creator must be an elf
